ai_summary: Avio Smart Market Stack (ASMS) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with StandardWings Technologies to jointly explore developing AI-powered digital infrastructure for rural India, focusing on agriculture, climate solutions, and financial inclusion. This collaboration leverages ASMS's extensive rural network with StandardWings's AI/IoT expertise, presenting significant potential for future growth in agri-tech. However, it is crucial to note that this is an *exploratory agreement* only, with any future commercial engagements requiring separate definitive contracts.
